text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
"City might run the Tiara tour!"
"You mean we'll get to see her wear the Triple
Tiara?!"

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
"I literally can't wait!"
...Get it? Everyone's talking about you!

(That's Tosen Jordan, a friend of Gold City's. She
can come off as a bit unmotivated at times.)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
They're getting way too hyped up. I haven't even
decided if I'm doing the Tiara tour yet.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Buuut... going for the Hanshin J.F. means you're
leaning in that direction pretty hard, right?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Maybe.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Heeey, you can tell me! Aren't we BFFs? ☆

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Since when?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Seriously?! You're so cold!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But anyways, you would look so, so pretty with the tiara.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oops, sorry. But come on, aren't you a bit too
sensitive about the word? I mean, it's just a fact.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I know everyone means it as a compliment, and
look, I'm grateful for that.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But that's not the real me. That's just some
ornament decorated by someone else.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
When I hear that word, I want to kick myself for
not being able to leave any other impression.
That's why I don't like hearing it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Who here thinks City gets way too deep about
these things? Meeee.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Listen. If that really bothers you, why don't you
stop modeling for a while?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
That would only mean I'm running away. I want to
prove I can be even better as a runner than as a
model.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Besides, the industry has done so much for me,
and my schedule is already booked for the next
few years.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Dang, you're so popular! Slay. ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, enough about that. Show me more of
what people are saying.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I don't wanna, 'cause you said we aren't BFFs.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't make that scary face! Fine, have it
your way.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
By the way, wanna hit up the cafeteria? I'm
starving.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: They're rooting for me, huh...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Um, Miss City? Can I, like, have my phone back
now?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hold on.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: It's surprising. All the comments are so positive.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I figured people would be more dismissive. Like,
"stay on the runway" or "what's a model gonna
do?"

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, so you were putting off searching your
name 'cause you were scared?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hah, spot on? What's up with that, though? You
don't let haters get to you one bit when you're
modeling!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Racing is different. Like I said, I'm doing this as
the real me.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I don't fully get it, but at least everyone's
looking forward to seeing you run.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like it. They really have high hopes for
me...
Bzzzt...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's a text from my manager.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, your manager... She's so scary. I bet you she
hates me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I don't think so.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I get the same vibe from your trainer too. Why're
you always attracting the hardcore types?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: That's what I wanna know... Oh.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
"The Triple Tiara would be well suited for you. I
can adjust your work schedule, so just let me
know whatever you need."

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
No way. Your manager is actually backing your
decision to race?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's what it looks like. I can barely
believe it either.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Wow, that's awesome! I'm so happy for you, City!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Although she made it sound like it's a favor.
Adjusting my schedule is literally her job.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Come on, stop trying to play it cool. I see you
smiling! ☆

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Shut up.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I have to do my best. No holding back!
